supportive: ("COVID-19"[Mesh] OR COVID-19[tiab] OR SARS-CoV-2[tiab]) AND (dexamethasone[tiab] OR corticosteroids[tiab]) AND (mortality[tiab] OR survival[tiab]) AND (hospitalized[tiab] OR severe[tiab])
contradictory: (("COVID-19"[Mesh] OR COVID-19[tiab] OR SARS-CoV-2[tiab]) AND (dexamethasone[tiab] OR corticosteroids[tiab]) AND (mortality[tiab] OR survival[tiab]) AND (hospitalized[tiab] OR severe[tiab])) AND ("no benefit"[tiab] OR "ineffective"[tiab] OR "failed trial"[tiab] OR "contradictory"[tiab] OR "versus placebo"[tiab] OR "negative study"[tiab] OR "did not improve"[tiab] OR "associated with harm"[tiab])
